name: full_gpu_scale_npp_h264_nvenc
description: Full-GPU pipeline: CUDA-accelerated decode → NPP scale → NVENC encode, no CPU round-trip. The textbook NVIDIA pipeline — and the one that exposes the multi-device hardware-graph gap when CUDA decode is paired with CPU-side filters or non-NVIDIA encoders.
blockers: nvidia-cuda-runtime (no CUDA device or no NVIDIA libs in build)
scale_npp-availability-probe (§2.3 'Hardware filter auto-mapping' / §3.4 step 6 'scale_npp vs scale_cuda per-filter availability probe')
h264_nvenc-availability (encoder may not be linked into ffstatic build)
roadmap_refs: §3.4 step 6 'scale_npp vs scale_cuda per-filter availability probe'
